situation: audit-2026-07-03-006 finding ESE-M02 (priority 4, route-fix): autonomous-loop.sh header comment claims '--max-iterations prevents claude -p single-round hang' and later 'cloudcli claude has no --max-iterations flag', but actual code never passes any turn/iteration limit to claude -p, nor wraps run_round in timeout. Comment/code contradiction misleads readers into believing a safety bound exists when it does not.
action: 1) Corrected header comment (line 14) to acknowledge --max-turns is available but default-off; documented two new env vars AUTONOMOUS_MAX_TURNS and AUTONOMOUS_ROUND_TIMEOUT. 2) Added env-var parsing before run_round definition. 3) Refactored run_round to build cmd array and conditionally append --max-turns / wrap in timeout. 4) Updated stale subshell comment (was line 144) referencing non-existent --max-iterations. Default behavior unchanged (backward-compatible). Archive copy at engine-skills-extracted also patched for consistency; next archive re-extract will pick up live version.
